channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: The Local Universe’s Expansion Rate Is Clearer Than Ever, but Still Doesn’t Add Up - NOIRLab
item.description:
1. The Local Universe’s Expansion Rate Is Clearer Than Ever, but Still Doesn’t Add Up  NOIRLab

  4. Astronomers Precisely Measure Universe's Expansion Rate, Hubble Tension Persists  National Today
  5. Every Method of Measuring the Universe’s Expansion Rate Agrees, and That’s a Problem  ScienceBlog.com

item.description:

item.title: Changing 'just one DNA letter' in female mice triggers growth of male genitalia - Live Science
item.description:

  3. A single-nucleotide enhancer mutation overrides chromosomal sex to drive XX male development  Nature
  4. With a switch of a letter in DNA ‘dark matter,’ Israeli scientists change sex of mouse  The Times of Israel
  5. One DNA letter can trigger complete sex reversal, Bar-Ilan University study finds  EurekAlert!
